title: floats — Service Architecture
description: Service-oriented vertical stack. API Gateway on top, Feature Services + Backend (drill-down for internals) in the middle, models at bottom. Backend reaches out horizontally to external platform APIs.

nodes.label: API Gateway
nodes.description: Top-level entry point. Routes UI requests to the backend. Single access point for all features.

properties.endpoints: getPersons, getPerson, getOverduePersons, updateNotes, addTag, removeTag, setReminder, logContact, addManualConversation, triggerSync

nodes.label: Reminder Service
nodes.description: Feature service. Cadence + overdue logic. Recomputes next_reminder_at from last_contacted_at + cadence_days. Reads/writes reminders via backend persistent repo.

nodes.label: Backend
nodes.description: On-device backend. Sync engine, profile builder, purge service, repositories, and SQLite storage. Drill down for internal architecture.

properties.responsibilities: sync from platforms, process raw data into person profiles, purge temp data

nodes.label: Platform APIs
nodes.description: Platform connectors reached horizontally by the backend sync engine. iMessage (Messages framework), WhatsApp (chat export), Instagram (data export), Manual entry.

nodes.label: Domain Models
nodes.description: Shared Sendable structs. Flow between backend and API gateway. Define the data contract across layers.
